# Sprint 3.1 Use Case Selection

**Sprint:** Sprint 3. Machine Learning And Advanced Analytics
**Objective:** Develop machine learning and advanced analytics capabilities to support predictive and prescriptive analytics.

## Description
Select and prioritize machine learning use cases, including call volume forecasting, staffing optimization, and appointment no-show prediction.

## Deliverable
Machine learning use case selection and prioritization
